title: Her Big Night
writer: Melville W. Brown, Peggy Gaddis, Nita O'Neil
actors: Laura La Plante, Einar Hanson, Zasu Pitts
plot: Tom Barrett, a motion picture press agent, noting Frances Norcross' resemblance to film star Daphne Dix, offers her passes to the star's personal appearance. While waiting for her fiancé, Johnny Young, Frances is offered $1,000 to...
